interpretation: In all 18 manually transcribed Huyền Khí summaries, the displayed total equals the sum of the twelve palace scores after treating unlisted palaces as zero.
Most values lie on a 0.25 grid, while residual values such as 0.18, 0.23, 0.31 and -0.34 show that the public output is not a pure quarter-step lookup table.
This validates an additive output contract, not the hidden palace-scoring formula.
